briefings.headline: Regulators Publish Updated List of Distressed and Underserved Rural Middle-Income Areas
briefings.body: Federal agencies have released an updated list identifying distressed or underserved nonmetropolitan middle-income geographies. These designations are used to determine where certain community development lending and investment activities qualify for favorable regulatory consideration under federal banking rules. The list helps financial institutions identify eligible areas for credit toward community reinvestment obligations.

sources.title: Agencies release list of distressed or underserved nonmetropolitan middle-income geographies

briefings.why_it_matters: Residents and businesses in designated communities could see increased access to loans and investment, as banks may prioritize lending in these areas to meet regulatory requirements. Local economies in qualifying regions could benefit from expanded financial services and development activity.

briefings.headline: Bank Regulators Issue Joint Guidelines on Sensitive Information Handling During Examinations
briefings.body: Federal banking agencies have issued a joint statement addressing how highly sensitive information should be handled during bank examinations. The statement establishes guidance for managing confidential data collected when regulators review financial institutions. The coordinated approach signals an effort to standardize practices across multiple oversight bodies involved in the examination process.

sources.title: Agencies issue joint statement on handling of highly sensitive information during bank examinations
Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former chief lending officer of Heritage State Bank

briefings.lane: Money & Markets (with a separate 'Why it matters' line)
briefings.why_it_matters: Customers and institutions could see stronger protections for sensitive financial data shared during regulatory reviews. Banks handling confidential information during examinations may need to review their internal compliance procedures to align with the updated joint guidance.

quick_hits.text: The Federal Reserve's annual stress test found large banks capable of withstanding a severe recession while continuing to lend to households and businesses.

source.title: Federal Reserve Board's annual bank stress test confirms that large banks are well positioned to weather a severe recession and able to continue to lend to households and businesses

voice_blocks.title: This Day
voice_blocks.text: 2025: A Bangladesh Air Force Chengdu FT-7BGI crashes shortly after takeoff into Milestone School campus in Dhaka, Bangladesh, killing 35 people and injuring 173.

closer.text: "Let the people know the facts, and the country will be safe."
